description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular body with a metallic silver and deep red color scheme, accented by a black grip and fore-end. The receiver is adorned with a prominent winged skull emblem, giving it a distinctive, aggressive appearance. The barrel is short and squared, with a large, hexagonal muzzle and a blocky, tactical design. The grip is slightly curved and appears to be made of a lighter material, possibly synthetic or composite, with a black lower section. The trigger area is protected by a squared, reinforced guard, and there are visible buttons or switches on the side, suggesting electronic or safety features. The overall construction suggests a modern, tactical shotgun designed for urban combat scenarios.
description: A tactical, angular shotgun with a metallic silver and red body, black grip, and a winged skull emblem. It features a short, squared barrel and a reinforced trigger guard.
description_view_0: The left side displays the winged skull emblem, red and silver panels, black fore-end, and a two-tone grip.
description_view_1: The front view shows the large, hexagonal barrel opening and the compact, blocky profile.
description_view_2: The right side reveals a simpler red and silver panel design, the ejection port, and the same two-tone grip.
description_view_3: The rear view highlights the squared receiver and the alignment of the barrel, with minimal visible detail.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and squared with a large hexagonal muzzle and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, reinforced, medium-sized with a solid geometric profile
